questions: How did you first become interested in the subject you are studying?
What has been the most surprising thing you have learned so far?
Was there a moment when you doubted your choice? What happened?
How do you think this major will shape your future career?
Can you tell me about a teacher who made a strong impression on you?
What specifically did they do that was different from other teachers?
How did their teaching change the way you approach learning?
If you could thank them today, what would you say?
What was the hardest part about moving away from your family?
How did you handle those difficulties in the beginning?
What daily habits helped you adjust to your new environment?
Looking back, how has living independently changed you?
Can you describe a group project you worked on recently?
What role did you naturally take on within the team?
How did your group handle a disagreement or a slacking member?
What would you do differently in your next group project?
What is a hobby you enjoy doing in your free time?
How did you first get started with it?
What do you find most rewarding about it?
Do you think this hobby has taught you anything useful?
Tell me about a challenge you faced and had to overcome.
What made the situation especially difficult for you?
What steps did you take to push through it?
How did overcoming it affect your confidence afterward?
How does technology fit into your everyday routine?
Is there an app or device you could not imagine living without?
Have you ever felt that technology created a problem for you?
How do you try to keep a healthy balance with your screen time?
Can you describe a trip that stands out in your memory?
What was the most unexpected thing you encountered there?
How did travelling to that place change your perspective?
Where would you like to travel next, and why?
Have you ever had a part-time job or internship? Tell me about it.
What was a typical day at that job like for you?
What was the most valuable lesson you took away from it?
How do you think that experience will help you in the future?
How do you usually organize your time during a busy week?
What tends to cause you the most stress as a student?
What strategies do you use to stay calm under pressure?
How has your approach to managing stress changed over time?

topic: A book or film that mattered
questions: Is there a book or film that has really stayed with you?
What was it about the story that resonated with you?
Did it change any of your ideas or opinions?
Would you recommend it to a friend, and how would you describe it?
Have you ever been involved in volunteer or community work?
What motivated you to get involved in the first place?
What did you find most difficult about the experience?
How did helping others affect the way you see your community?
What has your experience been like learning a new language?
Which part of the language do you find the hardest?
What methods have worked best for you in practicing it?
How do you feel when you can finally communicate in that language?
What qualities do you value most in a good friend?
Can you tell me how you met one of your closest friends?
How do you keep a friendship strong over time?
Has a friendship ever taught you something important about yourself?
Can you describe the place where you grew up?
What do you miss most about it when you are away?
Is there something you would change about your hometown?
How has growing up there shaped who you are today?
What is a goal you are currently working toward?
Why is this goal particularly meaningful to you?
What obstacles do you expect to face along the way?
How will you know when you have truly achieved it?
How do you try to stay healthy in your daily life?
Do you have a form of exercise or activity that you enjoy?
What makes it hard to stick to healthy habits sometimes?
How do you feel physically and mentally when you stay active?
Have you taken any online courses? What was that like?
What advantages did you notice compared to a physical classroom?
What did you find frustrating or limiting about studying online?
Which format do you prefer overall, and why?
Can you tell me about a mistake that taught you something?
What exactly went wrong in that situation?
How did you react once you realized your mistake?
What do you do differently now because of that experience?
Do you enjoy cooking, or do you prefer eating out?
Is there a dish that is especially meaningful to you?
Who taught you the most about food or cooking?
How do your food choices reflect your culture or personality?
